metadata.description: /watch-video or /cytospec to turn .md spec files into decision-graphs

plugins.name: mega-skill
plugins.description: Adds opt-in architectural patterns (applets, multi-agent publishing, mega-skill routing, pinning) to any skill-creation workflow. Works alongside skill-creator plugins.

plugins.name: cytospec
plugins.description: Extracts decisions from markdown files (specs, plans, design docs) and maps them into a graph. Produces a living artifact that grows across sessions — each run adds decisions, evidence accumulates, and the graph evolves as specs evolve.
